---
title: "Making first blog post"
subtitle: "on this website"
author:
  - name: Kath O'Reilly
    orcid_id: 0000-0002-4892-8022
date: 2026-03-11
toc: true
aliases:
  - getting started.html
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 80
---

Here is a very simple blog post. I am using markdown to create it, it's really simple - here is a [link](https://www.markdownguide.org/basic-syntax/#overview) to guidelines for adding things like URLs.

More posts to appear here very soon.
